mapper.select: SELECT p.perm_code FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.enabled = 1 GROUP BY p.perm_code ORDER BY MIN(p.sort_order)
SELECT permission_id FROM sys_role_permission WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
